common.tagline: AI-powered adaptive education that responds to your skills, emotions, and career goals in real-time.

header.title: Learning That
header.subtitle: The first AI-powered learning platform that adapts to both your skills and your emotional state. Learn faster, avoid burnout, and become career-ready.

features.adaptiveLearningDesc: Dynamically adjusts difficulty and content based on your performance and emotional state.
features.emotionalIntelligenceDesc: Track mood, stress, and motivation. Get personalized wellness recommendations.
features.skillGapAnalysisDesc: Advanced radar analytics showing exactly what you need to learn for your dream career.
features.microcertificationsDesc: Earn verified, shareable certificates with QR codes as you complete modules.
features.mentorshipHubDesc: Connect with expert mentors, join study groups, and collaborate on projects.
features.careerReadinessDesc: AI-powered employability index combining technical, soft skills, and resilience.

steps.setYourGoalsDesc: Choose your dream career path and complete a quick assessment.
steps.aiAnalyzesYouDesc: Our AI maps your skills, gaps, and emotional baseline to build your roadmap.
steps.learnAdaptivelyDesc: Study at your own pace with content that adapts to how you think and feel.

pricing.noPriceHikes: Start with Starter. Scale to Pro. No hidden fees, no surprises. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for getting started with adaptive learning
pricing.proDesc: For serious learners advancing their careers
pricing.switchPlansAnswer: Yes! Switch from Starter to Pro anytime, or downgrade whenever you need.
pricing.paymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.paymentMethodsAnswer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal.
pricing.annualDiscountAnswer: Get 20% off when you choose yearly billing instead of monthly.
pricing.freeTrialAnswer: Yes, enjoy a 14-day free trial with full Starter features—no credit card required.
pricing.afterTrial: What happens after my free trial?
pricing.afterTrialAnswer: Your trial converts to a paid plan. You can downgrade, upgrade, or cancel anytime.
pricing.refundsAnswer: Refunds available within 30 days of purchase if you're not satisfied.

dashboard.learningOverview: Here's your learning overview for today.

auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

community.joinStudyGroup: Join a study group and connect with fellow learners
